steps.title: Target ethnographic value
steps.content: The student's claim is that Quispe's photographs captured diverse elements of Peruvian society with dignity and authenticity. Evidence should show careful documentation of different people, places, or customs.

steps.title: Reject unrelated support
steps.content: Choice B focuses on technical skill. Choice C focuses on fame inside and outside Peru. Choice D says some subjects were already popular among photographers. None directly supports ethnographic breadth and careful social documentation. The answer is A.
